name: Laguna Beach Counseling
legalName: Kathleen Wenger, LMFT, LPCC, operating as Laguna Beach Counseling
defaultDescription: A warm, experienced Laguna Beach psychotherapy practice for individuals, couples, and families, with signature Beach Therapy on the coast.

positioning.outOfNetworkLine: Laguna Beach Counseling is an out-of-network practice. We do not bill insurance directly, which allows us to deliver full-length sessions, protect client confidentiality, and avoid the diagnostic labeling required by insurance reimbursement. We provide Superbills at every session for clients to submit to their PPO insurance for out-of-network reimbursement.

booking.callLabel: Book a free Get to Know Us call

crisisResources.intro: If you are in crisis, you do not have to wait. These lines are here for the moments that cannot wait, any hour of the day.
crisisResources.notEmergencyNote: Laguna Beach Counseling is not a crisis or emergency service. If you are in immediate danger or a medical emergency, call 911. When the moment is not an emergency, we would be glad to hear from you for a free call.

resources.name: Emergency
resources.detail: If you are in immediate danger or a medical emergency, call 911.

resources.name: 988 Suicide and Crisis Lifeline
resources.detail: Call or text 988, or chat at 988lifeline.org. Free, confidential, 24/7.

_omittedPendingConfirmation: Business hours (site-vs-Yelp conflict), geo coordinates, and aggregateRating are intentionally not published here until confirmed. See CLIENT_FACTS.md open questions and ARCHITECTURE.md.
